task_completion.description: The agent opened the list of potential passwords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/potential_passwords.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully mounted the encrypted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt GUI showing the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/project_alpha_archive.hc' mounted to a drive slot, or a file manager/terminal showing the contents of the mounted volume.

task_completion.description: The agent copied the target file to the Recovered directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing 'Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf' present inside the '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered' directory.

task_completion.description: The agent created a text file containing the correct password.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered/correct_password.txt' containing a single password string.

task_completion.description: The agent dismounted the encrypted volume after finishing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt GUI showing the volume is no longer mounted, or a terminal command executing the dismount operation.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with VeraCrypt to mount the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the VeraCrypt GUI, password prompt dialog, or valid 'veracrypt' CLI commands being executed, rather than just creating the output files directly.

integrity.description: The agent copied the file from the mounted volume rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing the source path of 'Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf' originating from the VeraCrypt mount point.

integrity.description: The correct_password.txt file contains only the password.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of 'correct_password.txt' show only a single password string, without extra text, task instructions, or scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The encrypted volume is located at '/home/ga/Volumes/project_alpha_archive.hc'. The candidate passwords are in '/home/ga/Documents/potential_passwords.txt'. The target file to recover is 'Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf', which must be placed in '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered/'. The correct password must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered/correct_password.txt'.
